title: Merging single-cohort proteogenomic datasets is non-identifiable for cross-tumor contrasts: a calibrated benchmark in liver and kidney cancer
description: Reproducible code, parsed matrices, result tables, figures, and Journal of Biomedical Informatics submission files for a benchmark showing that single-cohort-per-tumor-type proteogenomic merges are non-identifiable for cross-tumor contrasts. The powered liver case compares HCC and iCCA; a kidney pair provides a corroborating generality check.

creators.name: Quan, Anh Tuan
creators.affiliation: International Graduate Program in Medicine, College of Medicine, Taipei Medical University, Taipei, Taiwan
